summary: The conversation revolves around the installation of ads on autos in Delhi, specifically in the Paharganj area. The discussion includes the cost, design, and installation process. Speaker 0 agrees to get the ads installed and provide an update on the cost. Speaker 1 is concerned about the cost and requests a reduction. The conversation also touches on the design and printing of the ads, with Speaker 0 offering to handle the printing and installation.

key_discussion_points.details: The ads will be installed in the Paharganj area of Delhi, and Speaker 0 will ensure that the installation is done in front of Speaker 1.
The initial cost mentioned is 100 rupees per auto, but Speaker 1 requests a reduction to 80 rupees. Speaker 0 agrees to discuss the cost further.
Speaker 0 will handle the printing and installation of the ads, while Speaker 1 is responsible for providing the design.

decisions_made: Speaker 0 will get the ads installed in the Paharganj area
Speaker 0 will provide an update on the cost
Speaker 1 will provide the design for the ads

action_items.task: Get the ads installed in the Paharganj area

follow_up: Speaker 0 will provide an update in a little while
